name: @soma/guide-extension
description: Chrome MV3 extension: inject Ariadne (site-aware SOMA guide) into any page.

scripts.sync-engine: cp ../soma-guide/soma-guide.js vendor/soma-guide.js && cp ../soma-guide/soma-guide.css vendor/soma-guide.css && echo 'Engine synced from packages/soma-guide'
scripts.sync-mapper: cp ../auto-mapper/auto-mapper.js vendor/auto-mapper.js && cp ../auto-mapper/converter.js vendor/converter.js && echo 'Auto-mapper synced from packages/auto-mapper'
